channel.title: Posts on Jank Systems Ltd.
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Jank Systems Ltd.

item.title: records: browse your music collection over the net
item.description:
Hi! This is the first post of my personal blog, where I’ll document any thoughts, findings, or projects of mine.

records is a program I made to index any albums in your collection, and provide access to them from the internet. It will sort through a directory, with a hierarchy like this:

root-|
     |- artist
     |  \_ album
     |     |- cover.jpg
     |     \_ song.flac
     \_ artist ...

So song metadata is completely ignored and albums are indexed by your directory structure. They can then be displayed in a variety of ways on the web interface, including a grid of every album’s cover, a list of albums from an artist, or a list of all albums. Albums can also be sorted by name or by the amount of songs, so you can find your longest albums.
